subcodes.first_line: O you, who are captivated by the truth! Your letter has been received. It indicates that you have heard the voice of the Kingdom of God and are drawn to the divine breath
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @transcendence; unknowability of God
